description_long: This is a large, modern chandelier with a radial design, featuring eight evenly spaced arms extending from a central hub. Each arm supports an upward-facing, cylindrical lamp holder with a slightly tapered top, giving the fixture a sleek and contemporary appearance. The arms and central structure are composed of smooth, solid material, likely metal, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. The lamp holders appear to be made of frosted or opaque glass, designed to diffuse light softly. The chandelier is suspended from a single, straight rod, indicating it is intended for ceiling mounting. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a symmetrical arrangement, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern, radial chandelier with eight cylindrical glass lamp holders on metal arms, suspended from a ceiling rod. The design is sleek, symmetrical, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight arms radiating symmetrically from the center, with each lamp holder clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and spacing between the arms and the upward orientation of the lamp holders.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the radial symmetry and the uniformity of the lamp holders.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view, mirroring the front, with all arms and lamp holders visible in a balanced arrangement.
